title: Ripple teams with Kyobo on South Korea tokenized bond settlement
message_html: Ripple teams with Kyobo on South Korea tokenized bond settlement ...
snippet: Ripple and Kyobo Life are piloting tokenized government bond settlement as South Korea builds rules for token securities and digital asset payments.

title: eToro to acquire Zengo in self-custody push as CEO predicts $250K Bitcoin
message_html: eToro to acquire Zengo in self-custody push as CEO predicts $250K Bitcoin ...
snippet: eToro is set to acquire self-custodial wallet provider Zengo, and the trading platform’s CEO predicted a Bitcoin rally above $250,000 after another quarter of crypto market downside.
